articles.title: SEC’s Stance on Solana Remains Ambiguous, How Will SOL be Impacted?
articles.description: The United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has not explicitly declared Solana (SOL) a non-security. The SEC withdrew the demand for a court judgment in its lawsuit against Binance. Legal scholars have noted that the SEC’s position on Solana is still not clear. Jake Chervinsky, the Chief Legal Officer at Variant Fund, also shared his thoughts on […]

articles.title: BlackRock’s Ethereum ETF inflow surpasses its Bitcoin ETF inflow
articles.description: Quick Take Farside data shows that on July 30, Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) experienced an $18.3 million outflow, marking the first outflow since July 23. Outflows occurred across three of the four largest ETF issuers, including Bitwise’s BITB, ARK’s ARKB, and Fidelity’s FBTC. In contrast, BlackRock’s IBIT ETF stood out as the only ETF issuer […] The post BlackRock’s Ethereum ETF inflow surpasses its Bitcoin ETF inflow appeared first on CryptoSlate.
